title: UHC - Optimized
description: The Best Ressource Pack for UHC.
body:
# UHC - Optimized

_**This resource pack was created with the goal of providing the best UHC experience.**_

**This Pack modifies the following items/particules:**

> **The Cobblestone/Deepslate were modified.**

> **Planks/Minerals/Suspicious Outline.** _(Release)_

> **Side Shield + Particle** _(Release)_

> **The Sides of Grass Block got lower.**

> **The ground of Gapple/GoldenHead has been set.**

> **Clear & Water/Lave + Particle.** _(Release)_

> **The Fullbright is included in the pack.**

> **New Glint & Armor/Weapons** _(Release)_

> **Gapple Scale + Drop** _(Release)_

> **Charge Indicator** _(Release)_

> **Preview Video** _(Release)_

### Preview Video

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/sasGmH1agEw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**_This pack is not only made for survival between friends, it is also made to play in multiplayer on servers pratice like._**

> **SwiftPvP** _(eu.swiftpvp.xyz)_

> **PvPClub** _(eu.mcpvp.club)_

> **FadedMC** _(fadedmc.net)_

> **PyxisMC** _(pyxismc.xyz)_ (holy bad server btw)

> **MetalMC**

> **CatPvP**

**_This Resource Pack is compatible with all other resource packs, you just need to put it in the first line of resource packs for it to work._**

**_Using this pack, yKoseli got High Tier 3 on UHC (FrenchTierlist). (Is Real)_**

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53153aece2895fdea4a2a14f50205b7231715a4c.png)

# UHCOptimized By yKoseli
